title: Paper Tools
description: This mod adds a new set of tools made from paper! It uses the standard vanilla crafting recipes—just replace the ore, wood, or stone with paper. This mod only adds tools (Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, Sword, Hoe) and does not include any armor... yet.
body:
Paper Tools - Use Your Extra Paper! Description: Ever have chests full of paper and nothing to do with it? Now you can craft a full set of tools!

This lightweight mod introduces:

Paper Sword

Paper Pickaxe

Paper Axe

Paper Shovel

Paper Hoe

Special Features: All paper tools inflict minor "papercut" damage, adding a unique, small, debuff or effect to whatever they interact with! These tools also have a high chance of getting really good enchantments to make them last a bit longer and do more damage and so forth.


Crafting: It's simple! Just use the "OG" vanilla crafting recipes for tools, but use Paper as the main material instead of ingots, diamonds, or cobblestone.

Ps: Its more of just a prank or fun mod to add to for fun.
